announcement: No minimum orders • Personal service • Made in Connecticut

hero.eyebrow: You Name It. We Make It.
hero.description: Custom embroidery, apparel and personalized products made with care, honest communication and no minimum order.

about.title: More than a business. It is our purpose.
about.paragraph_1: Imaginable Things began during a season without work, when a small hobby became a way to create income. Along the way, we discovered a real passion for turning ideas into beautiful, useful products.
about.paragraph_2: Today, we serve churches, schools, contractors, restaurants, barbershops, clothing brands and individuals with accessible pricing, personalized attention and no minimum order requirement.
about.paragraph_3: Our Christian values guide how we treat people: with honesty, respect, service and care.

contact.title: Ready to bring your idea to life?
contact.description: Tell us what you need, how many pieces you want and when you need them.

featured_section.title: Quality you can see.
featured_section.description: A selection of real work created by Imaginable Things.

steps.title: Tell Us Your Idea
steps.description: Send your logo, design or inspiration.

steps.title: Approve the Details
steps.description: We confirm product, placement and quantity.

steps.title: We Create It
steps.description: Your order is made with attention to detail.

steps.title: Enjoy the Result
steps.description: Receive a custom piece made for you.
